violations.text: The facility currently has a handwashing sink in the front service area only. The back prep/warewashing area does not have a hand-washing sink that is conveniently located. Hand-washing sinks must be located to allow convenient use by employees in food preparation, food dispensing, and ware-washing areas. Per the Owner, hand sink is to be installed for easier access in the back prep/warewashing area. New Violation. Correct By: 06/30/2025
